positive: A maximalist, symmetrical, stylized cosmic floral arrangement featuring bioluminescent jellyfish, iridescent mushrooms, and blooming fractal mandalas. The composition should be dense and vibrant, utilizing bold, contrasting jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst, and electric gold) against a deep midnight black background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau etching and detailed digital psychedelia, emphasizing clean lines, strong silhouettes, and a sense of organized chaos. Ideal for a repeating textile pattern, designed for seamless printing. Central focus, high contrast, symmetrical layout, intricate detail.
negative: blur, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, cartoon, sketch, grainy, cropped, low contrast
